treatment_goals: Improve coping skills for anxiety and depression symptoms

extracted_data.clinical_narrative: The clinician reviewed coping skills, grounding techniques, housing stability plans, budgeting steps, communication strategies, sleep routine goals, medication adherence, family stressors, problem solving, emotional regulation, safety planning, and community supports.
